title: [Virelion Hall, Nook]
description: Shadows gather in the corners of the narrow cranny, kept at bay by a single brass wall sconce, the flame burning low and steady.  One wall is given over entirely to velvet-lined niches, arranged in neat rows from the stone floor to the gently arched ceiling.  Densely filled with faded rows of names and dates, a leatherbound ledger lies open on a slanted writing surface against the back of the recess.
